name: kaos-agent-skills
description: Official agent skills for the KAOS Agentic Operating System — AI-powered Kubernetes infrastructure management.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-skills
plugins.description: Full KAOS PRD lifecycle — create, start, advance, track progress, capture decisions, and complete Product Requirements Documents. Includes sprint orchestrator and automated PRD update reminders via hooks.

plugins.name: kaos-debug-skills
plugins.description: KAOS platform debugging, composition troubleshooting, and plan-and-delegate workflow skills. Structured RCA, Crossplane composition validation, and streamlined agent delegation.

plugins.name: kaos-kubeapp-skills
plugins.description: KubeApp lifecycle management — create, read, update, delete, and deep-verify KubeApps with full CI/CD pipeline verification.
